title: mespilus microphylla
intro: Mespilus microphylla, also known as the dwarf medlar or Chinese quince, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mespilus microphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin.
